title: tabernaemontana muelleriana
intro: Tabernaemontana muelleriana, also known as the Mueller's cow's horn or the Yellow Trumpet Vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a tropical evergreen vine native to the tropical regions of Australia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains alkaloids such as tabernanthine, which has been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, offering potential health benefits including pain relief and the treatment of fever. In traditional medicine, Tabernaemontana muelleriana is prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties.
